title: Top 5 Stocks With High ROE to Buy in a Volatile Market
text: Over the past few trading days, the U.S. equity markets witnessed a roller-coaster ride as a four-week winning streak — the longest rally since November 2021 — was annulled by a sudden slide at the beginning of the week. The markets were pressed by uncertainty owing to the Fed's stance to hold interest rates steady while keeping the door ajar for another hike before the end of the year.

title: NRG Energy CEO Gutierrez ousted in pact with activist investor
text: NRG Energy (NYSE:NRG) Inc announced on Monday that its president and CEO Mauricio Gutierrez has left the company and resigned from its board of directors after the independent power producer reached a deal with activist investor Elliott Investment Management LP.  NRG said its chairman Lawrence Coben will become interim CEO as the company initiates a search to identify a permanent replacement for Gutierrez.

title: NRG Energy CEO Exits. It's No Surprise.
text: Mauricio Gutierrez, president and CEO of utility NRG, is out a few months after the return of activist investor Elliott Management.

title: NRG Energy CEO Gutierrez leaves company, as activist investor Elliott gets its wish
text: Shares of NRG Energy Inc. NRG rose 0.9% into record territory in premarket trading Monday, after the energy utility said Chief Executive Officer Mauricio Gutierrez has left the company after being named CEO eight years ago, and after 19 years with the company. The company also said it would add four independent directors to its board, all as part of a cooperation agreement with activist investor Elliott Investment Management.

title: NRG Energy Announces Leadership Changes
text: HOUSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--NRG announced Lawrence Coben, Ph.D., Chair of the NRG Board of Directors, has been appointed Interim President and Chief Executive Officer.

title: Lights Still On At NRG Energy, Rated Hold As Earnings Overshadowed By Share Price
text: NRG Energy rated hold, in line with SA quant system. Some positive elements include strong earnings growth, positive cash flow, dividend growth, and strong market position in utilities. A few headwinds include mediocre revenue growth vs peers, a below-average dividend yield, and a negative return on equity.

title: NRG Energy Celebrates Business Customers During Fourth Annual Excellence in Energy Awards
text: HOUSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--NRG Energy, Inc. (NYSE: NRG) honored some of its top energy customers today for their leadership in community, sustainability, and energy efficiency during the fourth annual Excellence in Energy Awards. The Excellence in Energy Awards recognizes NRG customers who demonstrate a strong commitment to the planning and achievement of their environmental and community goals. title: NRG Energy's stock surges toward a 17-month high after $950 million ASR announced
text: Shares of NRG Energy Inc. NRG, +2.17% charged up 1.7% toward a 17-month high, after the energy utility announced a $950 million accelerated share repurchase program. That represents about 9.2% of the company's current market capitalization of $10.29 billion.

title: NRG (NRG) Q3 Earnings: Taking a Look at Key Metrics Versus Estimates

title: NRG Energy (NRG) Beats on Q3 Earnings, Ups '23 Guidance
text: NRG Energy's (NRG) third-quarter 2023 earnings improve year over year, while revenues decline. The company raises its 2023 guidance.

title: NRG Energy misses revenue estimates
text: NRG Energy on Thursday missed Wall Street estimates for third-quarter revenues and reported lower contributions from its home services business and one of its power plants to its profits.

title: NRG Energy's stock surges toward a 1-year high after Guggenheim turns bullish a day before earnings are due
text: Shares of NRG Energy Inc. NRG charged up 3.9% toward a one-year high in afternoon trading Wednesday, after Guggenheim turned bullish on the independent power producer the day before earnings are scheduled for release. Analyst Shahriar Pourreza raised his rating to buy, after being at neutral since March 2021, while bumping up his stock price target to $50 from $36.

title: NRG Completes Sale of its Interest in South Texas Project
text: HOUSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--NRG Energy, Inc. (NYSE: NRG) announced today its subsidiaries Texas Genco LP LLC and Texas Genco GP LLC have completed the sale of NRG South Texas LP, which owns a 44% interest in the South Texas Project Electric Generating Station (STP), to Constellation for $1.75 billion. STP is a 2,645 MW nuclear facility located about 90 miles southwest of Houston in Bay City, Texas. The 44% interest represented approximately 1,100 MWs of output. The sale received final regulatory.

title: NRG Energy (NRG) to Post Q3 Earnings: What's in the Offing?
text: NRG Energy's (NRG) third-quarter earnings are likely to have gained from strong demand due to extreme heat in its service territories and the systematic repurchase of shares.
